info.title: Dataverse Table Manager CLI
info.description: A powerful command-line tool for managing Microsoft Dataverse tables, columns, forms, and web resources using JSON configuration files. Simplify your Power Platform development workflow with declarative table definitions and automated deployments.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Dataverse Table Manager CLI - Manage Dataverse tables and columns from JSON

commands.name: auth
commands.description: Manage authentication profiles for Dataverse environments

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new authentication profile

commands.name: set
commands.description: Set the active authentication profile

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all authentication profiles

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete an authentication profile

commands.name: clear-cache
commands.description: Clear authentication token cache

commands.name: table
commands.description: Manage Dataverse tables and columns

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create tables and columns from JSON definition

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate a JSON table definition file

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export tables from Dataverse to JSON format

commands.name: upsert
commands.description: Create or update tables and columns in Dataverse

commands.name: tables
commands.description: Create or update multiple tables from JSON definition

commands.name: single
commands.description: Create or update a single table from JSON definition

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete tables and columns from Dataverse

commands.name: tables
commands.description: Delete tables from Dataverse based on JSON definition

commands.name: columns
commands.description: Delete columns from tables based on JSON definition

commands.name: schema
commands.description: Generate and manage JSON schema templates

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a JSON schema template

commands.name: template
commands.description: List available schema templates

commands.name: webresource
commands.description: Manage webresources in Dataverse

commands.name: push
commands.description: Upload webresources from local folder to Dataverse

commands.name: pull
commands.description: Download webresources from Dataverse to local folder

commands.name: list
commands.description: List webresources in Dataverse

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete webresources from Dataverse

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Watch for file changes and automatically sync webresources

commands.name: forms
commands.description: Manage Dataverse forms

commands.name: push
commands.description: Create or update forms from JSON

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export forms to JSON
